message.content:
@startuml
!theme plain

class "Config" as Config {
  [C]
  - properties : Properties
  - config : Config
  + Config()
  + getConfig() : Config
}

class "DBConnectionTest" as DBConnectionTest {
  [C]
  + hashCodeTest() : void
  + performanceTest() : void
  + DBH2Test() : void
}

class "DBConnection" as DBConnection {
  [C]
  - connection : Connection
  - dbConnection : DBConnection
  + DBConnection()
  + getDBConnection() : DBConnection
  + getConnection() : Connection
}

Config --> Config : 1
DBConnectionTest ..> DBConnection : 
Config --> DBConnection : 1
DBConnection --> DBConnection : 1

@enduml
